author: codex-duplicate-audit

patch.value: Deduplicate lazy dynamic-import cache boilerplate in CLI registration

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: CLI registration modules repeatedly hand-roll nullable promise caches and import wrappers. Representative copies: src/cli/main.ts:227-242 loadSetupRegistrationModule, src/cli/register-mutation.ts:22, src/cli/register-list-query.ts:23, src/cli/register-operations.ts:21, and src/cli/register-setup.ts:15. Existing searches found closed main.ts decomposition and cache items, but no active item for the core CLI lazy-import helper pattern.

A small shared lazy-module/once-import helper owns the nullable promise cache pattern; registration module import boundaries and startup behavior stay unchanged; focused CLI registration/startup tests and pnpm build pass.

value.author: codex-duplicate-audit
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm search 'lazy dynamic import cache onceImport registration modules register-mutation register-setup' found no active exact item; pm-js0r and pm-y5u0 cover plugin/package helper duplication, not core CLI registration lazy imports.

message: Create duplicate-audit finding for lazy import cache helpers
